items.title: Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor
items.desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instru…
items.raw_desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instrument can reliably check whether there are ferrous or non-ferrous metals, wood or live wires in walls, ceilings or floors. The detection results are indicated by an acoustic signal together with an LCD display and a light indicator. If the light ring around the centering hole is green, there is no obstruction in the wall and the location can be marked as safe through the marking hole. In the case of orange, the detector approaches the object in the wall, while red indicates that the centering hole is directly above the detected object, for example a metal profile. The detector's operating mode can be set simply using the push-button control, and there is also an automatic calibration function to ensure maximum detection accuracy. The TE-MD 80 is powered by one 9V block battery (not included).                     Key features of the Einhell TE-MD...

	Prozkoumejte rozmanitá zákoutí ostrova Sodor a objevte jeho krásy z pohledu strojvedoucího. Každá cesta v Thomas and Friends: Wonders of Sodor PS5 přináší nové zážitky, setkání s oblíbenými postavami a úkoly, které prověří vaši šikovnost i pozornost. Atmosféra známého světa Tomáše vás doprovodí na každém kilometru trati.
	


	
		
	
	
	Poznejte další lokomotivy
	Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor PS5 přináší dobrodružnou jízdu plnou přátelství, objevování a radosti z jízdy. Vydejte se na cestu, kde na vás čekají kouzelná místa, známé lokomotivy i nové příběhy, které rozšiřují svět ostrova...

items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link LS108GP:A network switch is an active network component connecting individual devices or other network elements. It is designed for coordinating network traffic. The TP-Link LS108GP is made to be mounted on the desk or wall. This type has a switching capacity of 16 Gb/s. The Switch features 8 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows file transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 158 × 99 × 25mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology ensures the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also allows you to set up end station priority. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology that provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The switch weighs 290g. items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Star Wars - Hoth ostroma:                Launch giant stepping robots in Star Wars - Hoth ostromaStar Wars - Hoth Ostroma, a themed version of the successful war game Memoir '44, lets players battle against each other in 17 exciting missions. Launch giant stepping robots to prevent the evacuation of the Rebel base or slow down the Empire's attack by mobilizing snowmobiles. 74 detailed minifigures complete the perfect experience. The game is designed for players who want to be transported to an iconic movie battle and experience it on their own table. The game is suitable for players aged 8 and over and you should allow approximately 30 minutes per game. Thanks to its easy-to-understand rules, even less experienced players can master it, but it still offers enough tactics to interest even strategy enthusiasts. Whether you're leading a ruthless Imperial army or taking command of heroic rebels, you'll face a thrilling conflict in which your orders, and a little bit of luck, are the deciding factor.                             8+
